title: [Control systems] Hitachi security advisory (AV26-218)
description: On March 10, 2026, Hitachi published a security advisory to address a vulnerability in the following products:
products: Hitachi Device Manager (Windows/Linux)  versions prior to 8.8.8-02
Hitachi Tuning Manager (Windows/Linux)  versions prior to 8.8.8-02
Hitachi Compute Systems Manager (Windows/Linux)  versions prior to 8.8.8-01
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
